The '''2-ZH surgical droid''' was a [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] produced by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]] primarily for military applications.

Similar in many respects to the popular [[2-1B surgical droid/Legends|2-1B surgical droid]] developed in conjunction with Industrial Automaton by [[Geentech]], the green-shelled 2-ZH [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was commonly used in military prisons.<ref name="AJ13" />

In [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]] this type of droid "healed" [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] during their imprisonment on [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]].
